title: The podman process wakes up between 10-20 times per second, per powertop
body:
### Issue Description

I'm afraid I haven't done my homework to narrow this down, so I just have evidence from `powertop(1)`.  The `podman` process wakes up between 10 and 20 times per second for a container that should be pretty much idle - it's a shell inside a distrobox.

Is it possible that there is a runaway timer, or something?
